creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems to me you have. a group pgsql with a gid different from 70?

===> Creating groups.
Using existing group 'pgsql'.
===> Creating users
Creating user 'pgsql' with uid '70'.
pw: group `70' does not exist


it decides to use the existing group 'pgsql', but there is no group 70.
